title: The Undisclosed Anxiety Disorder
desc: GAD diagnosis hidden from firm, Tomas, Renata. Garmin biometrics + therapy calendar + reminder data paint clinical picture.

title: The Tuition Drain
desc: UVA tuition ($4,300/mo) devastating finances. 529 nearly depleted. Emergency fund stalled. Projects stability to everyone.

title: The Cooking Channel
desc: @AdriCocina YouTube/Instagram must stay separate from professional identity. Partnership culture views outside activities as distractions.

title: The Mentorship Mask
desc: Privately second-guesses advice to Fatima and Grayson. Case Reflections journal contains explicit self-doubt. Public persona is confident.

title: The Co-Parenting Firewall
desc: Tomas must only receive logistics. Any leaked info about health, finances, hobbies shifts co-parenting power dynamic.

title: The 3 AM Pattern
desc: Chronic sleep deficit (4.2 hrs weeknights), 5:30 AM swims, midnight Slack messages. Cross-referenced data reveals unsustainable pattern.
